stimulus.content: A class is making a poster about the key principles of American democracy. They want to include ideas that the founders believed were most important for the new country.

stem: Which TWO are key principles of American democracy?

choices.text: Rule of law for all people
Power given only to the rich

answer_explanation: Rule of law and popular sovereignty are two key principles of American democracy. Rule of law means everyone follows the same laws. Popular sovereignty means the people hold the power. A king or rule by the rich goes against democratic ideas.
